data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: Decoupled architecture with independent services for scalability and resilience.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes RESTful APIs and message brokers for inter-service communication.

data.title: Content Delivery Network (CDN)
data.description: High-performance globally distributed network for efficient streaming.
data.technical_spec: Leverages third-party CDNs and proprietary Open Connect Appliances.

data.title: Dynamic Load Balancing
data.description: Ensures efficient resource use and optimal user experience.
data.technical_spec: Automated scaling and real-time traffic distribution.

data.title: Database Management
data.description: Robust data handling with distributed database systems.
data.technical_spec: Uses NoSQL databases like Cassandra and support for SQL databases.

data.title: Cloud-native Infrastructure
data.description: Flexible deployment across cloud environments with AWS backbone.
